description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular, light beige wooden top with subtle wood grain texture, supported by four turned, spindle-style legs painted in a muted white. The front face includes a single drawer with a small, round metallic knob handle, providing a functional storage compartment. The drawer front is framed by a simple, flat apron, and the overall design is classic and understated, with no ornate carvings or embellishments. The legs are slightly bulbous and taper toward the feet, giving the piece a traditional, vintage-inspired look. The finish appears matte, with a slightly distressed effect on the painted surfaces, suggesting a rustic or cottage aesthetic. This nightstand would typically be found beside a bed or against a wall in a residential or urban setting.
description: A classic nightstand with a light beige wooden top, white spindle legs, and a single drawer with a round metallic knob. The design is simple, matte, and slightly rustic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single drawer with a round metallic knob and all four turned legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the top and the profile of the spindle legs, with no drawer visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the four legs, with no drawer or handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile and leg details, similar to view 1.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
